title: RNA-seq files and supporting Information and for the article: González et al. 2025. The photoheterotroph Dokdonia sp. MED134 modulates the expression of resource acquisition and anaplerotic carbon fixation pathways in response to temperature. Environ. Microbiol.
author: González, José

description: Raw and processed RNA-seq files for studies on the response of the flavobacterium  Dokdonia  sp. MED134 to temperature and light, and supplementary files of the article.
